<!-- Provide a clear description of your changes -->

## 🔗 Related Issue

<!-- Link to related issue(s) -->
Closes #[issue number]
<!-- or -->
Relates to #[issue number]

## 🎯 Type of Change

- [ ] ✨ Feature (new functionality)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (fixing existing issue)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation (update docs)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (improve code structure)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance (optimize performance)
- [ ] 🧪 Test (add/update tests)
- [ ] 🔧 Chore (maintenance, dependencies)
- [ ] 🚀 CI/CD (GitHub Actions, pipelines)

## 💥 Breaking Changes

- [ ] This PR contains breaking changes

<!-- If yes, describe what breaks and the migration path -->

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows naming convention (`<type>/NGFW-XX-description`)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits format (`feat(scope): description`)
- [ ] If the repository has tests, they pass locally
- [ ] If the repository has a linter, it reports no errors
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] Code is properly formatted
- [ ] Related documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] No breaking changes (or documented)

## 🧪 Testing

<!-- How was this tested? -->

Example:
- [ ] Unit tests added and passing
- [ ] Manual testing on development environment
- [ ] Tested in Docker container
- [ ] Cross-browser testing (if applicable)

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)

## ℹ️ Additional Information

<!-- Any additional context or information -->

**PR Title Format:**
```
<type>(<scope>): <description>
```

**Examples:**
```
feat(firewall): add IP whitelist validation
fix(packet-capture): handle malformed packets
docs: add deployment guide
```
